name: Aero Motors Used Car Sales
description_short: Family-owned used car dealership in Essex, MD since 1953 offering in-house financing for buyers with bad credit, no credit, or poor credit history.
description_long:
Aero Motors, Inc. is a non-franchised used car dealership established in 1953 in Baltimore, Maryland, and is now operated by second and third-generation family members. Over 70 years, the company has grown into one of Maryland's largest independent used car dealers, maintaining a philosophy of selling low-mileage vehicles at fair value with pre- and post-sale service.

The company primarily offers used vehicle sales with in-house financing (Buy Here, Pay Here model) designed specifically for consumers with bad credit, no credit, or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans. Their financing approach emphasizes that "Your Job Is Your Credit" and "We finance your future, not your past." They maintain a 65-vehicle inventory ranging from $5,000 to $20,000, spanning sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans, and wagons from brands including Ford, Chevrolet, Nissan, Jeep, and Toyota. Service contracts are available on all vehicles.

Aero Motors distinguishes itself through an on-site 12-bay auto repair facility with full-time mechanics staffed to inspect vehicles before sale and provide ongoing maintenance for customers post-purchase. Their longevity in the same community (63+ years) and emphasis on repeat and referral customers suggests established reputation and customer retention. The dealership also offers test-drive booking, vehicle locating services, and a "Refer a Friend" program.

The primary limitation is that this is a subprime auto financing operation, meaning customers will face higher interest rates and stricter payment terms than traditional auto loans. No specific APR, term length, or payment structures are disclosed on the website. The inventory consists entirely of used vehicles, many 5-10+ years old, with only one 2019 model listed. This is fundamentally a dealer-financed vehicle purchase option, not a personal loan product.
pros: Established 70+ year family business with deep community roots and 63+ years operating from same Essex, MD location
In-house financing available for borrowers with bad credit, no credit, or poor credit—no traditional bank approval required
On-site 12-bay auto repair facility with full-time mechanics for pre-sale inspection and post-sale maintenance
Service contracts available on all vehicles, providing repair protection for buyers
Large inventory of 65 vehicles with diverse selection (sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans, wagons) and price range ($5K-$20K)
"Your Job Is Your Credit" philosophy—employment status weighted more heavily than credit history
Test-drive booking, vehicle locating, and Refer-a-Friend program available
cons: No APR, interest rates, payment terms, or loan details disclosed—borrowers must apply to learn actual cost
Buy Here, Pay Here model typically involves higher interest rates and stricter payment requirements than traditional auto loans
Inventory skews older; majority of vehicles are 2007-2016 models with only one 2019 listed
Subprime financing means customers likely have limited alternative options and may face predatory terms
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional auto loans
Buyers in Baltimore/Essex, MD metro area seeking local in-house dealer financing
Workers with stable employment but poor credit seeking reliable used transportation
diagnosis: Aero Motors is a subprime auto financing dealer best suited for consumers with damaged credit histories who need vehicle financing and cannot qualify for traditional bank auto loans. The critical caveat is that Buy Here, Pay Here financing typically carries significantly higher costs than standard auto loans, and actual terms (APR, payment amounts, loan length) are not disclosed online—applicants must complete their application to learn true costs.
services: Buy Here, Pay Here in-house auto financing
Post-sale auto repair and maintenance in 12-bay service center
